_meta.note: Home page is a narrow hero card (~296px) overlaid on a full-bleed hero image, with full-width section rails below (Boats Near You, Featured Brands, Popular Types, Popular Boats, Articles). Hero card holds H1 + AI search form.

hero_card._real_class: .ai-search-v2__form (parent is a positioned hero overlay container)
hero_card.note: Hero search form sits at top-left of hero image at ~14px inset, narrow 296px width. NOT a full-page-width search bar — it's an overlay card.

hero_h1.note: Bold white text directly above the search form, same 14px x inset. Implies the hero card contains both H1 and form stacked vertically over the hero image.

section_rails._layout: Each section is a full-width row with an H2 header followed by a horizontal scrollable card rail.

boats_near_you.note: Subtext 'Based on your location' renders inline after the heading text — same H2 element, separator likely a span or a hyphen.

featured_brands._status: TODO — section present per headings_h2 enumeration, not individually probed

_known_matches_in_fidelity_md: Hero search bar (.ai-search-v2) shares structure with SRP search — Try + rotator + sparkle + magnifier (v=86, v=87)
Footer + columns match real BT layout
_capture_methodology: Open https://www.boattrader.com/ at 1512px viewport, scroll through each section to make it visible, then run the structural probe per section. The top-of-page hero rendering is unusual — H1 + form are inside a narrow 296px card overlaid on the hero image, not full-width.
